query:
-- 1. Remove 10 "TEST" duplicates (visible to Reagan as cluttered grid)
DELETE FROM appLinks WHERE name LIKE 'TEST %';

-- 2. Remove the duplicate Epic tile (keep 30046 "Epic! Books")
DELETE FROM appLinks WHERE id = 210094;

-- 3. Insert the missing apps from the user's list
-- Use INSERT IGNORE-style with NOT EXISTS so this query is idempotent if re-run.
INSERT INTO appLinks (name, url, category, emoji, description)
SELECT * FROM (
  SELECT 'Photomath' AS name, 'https://photomath.com' AS url, 'school' AS category, '📷' AS emoji, 'Camera-based math problem solver' AS description
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Kahoot!', 'https://kahoot.com', 'school', '🎯', 'Quiz games'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Class Dojo', 'https://www.classdojo.com', 'school', '👋', 'Behavior tracking + parent messaging'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Starfall', 'https://www.starfall.com', 'reading', '⭐', 'Reading, phonics, and math'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Clever', 'https://clever.com', 'school', '🍀', 'School SSO portal (adult use)'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Google Classroom', 'https://classroom.google.com', 'google', '🏫', 'Assignment hub'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Ohio Learning Standards', 'https://education.ohio.gov/Topics/Learning-in-Ohio/Learning-Standards', 'learning', '🏛️', 'Ohio Department of Education — what each grade is supposed to cover'
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Kimi AI', 'https://kimi.com', 'learning', '🤖', 'AI tutor + chat assistant'
) AS new_apps
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM appLinks a WHERE a.name = new_apps.name
);

SELECT id, name, category FROM appLinks ORDER BY category, name;
